text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. I used my day off to
recharge my energy levels.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I switched to sleep mode, and kept other
bodily functions such as breathing and blinking to
a minimum.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Consequently, I have successfully eliminated my
fatigue and am now refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Now switching to active mode. I look forward to
our training today.
